s: In 1999, Brett Laxton suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.450, WHIP 1.970, SO 9, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> KCR).
In 2000, Brett Laxton suited up for KCR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.100, WHIP 1.980, SO 14, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined KCR.
